---
title: "About Me"
subtitle: "Welcome to my data science portfolio!"
# use quarto markdown to 
---

This portfolio contains projects completed in the Data Science Programming course at Brigham Young University - Idaho. These projects cover a range of topics starting with data cleansing, data exploration, SQL, machine learning, and lastly a full stack development final project. Each section is designed to demonstrate my skills and knowledge in these areas, feel free to take a look around!
